problem: How does gut microbiome composition directly affect brain chemistry and mood?
mechanism: Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier
hypothesis: How does gut microbiome composition directly affect brain chemistry and mood? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Nanoparticle. Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 22 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
